properties.displayName: South African Government Cloud Security Controls
properties.description: South African Government consolidated cloud security compliance framework covering digital governance (eGovernment framework), personal data protection (POPIA), sovereign cloud architecture (SITA), intergovernmental relations (IGR Framework Act 13 of 2005), and public service requirements. Applicable to all South African national, provincial, and local government entities deploying cloud services.

metadata.authority: SITA, Department of Public Service and Administration, Information Regulator

policyDefinitionGroups.name: SAG_DGV
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Requirements for national digital strategy alignment, eGovernment framework compliance, cloud-first policy, intergovernmental coordination, and open standards.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: SAG_PDP
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Requirements under the Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) including lawful processing, data subject rights, consent management, breach notification, and data retention.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: SAG_CLD
policyDefinitionGroups.description: SITA sovereign cloud architecture requirements including data residency within South Africa, local key management, government network connectivity, background-checked personnel, and cloud exit strategy.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: SAG_NET
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Government network segmentation, secure internet gateway, private connectivity to PaaS services, and network traffic inspection requirements.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: SAG_IAM
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Government identity federation, multi-factor authentication enforcement, privileged access management, and security clearance integration requirements.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: SAG_DAT
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Government data classification per official schema, encryption with customer-managed keys, secure data sanitization, and government records management requirements.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: SAG_SEC
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Government SOC integration, threat intelligence sharing with national CSIRT, security event correlation, and vulnerability management requirements.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: SAG_GOV
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Adoption of government-mandated compliance frameworks (POPIA, SITA Act, PFMA, Public Service Regulations), ongoing POPIA assurance, government audit requirements, and change management.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: SAG_BCM
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Critical service availability, government disaster recovery requirements with defined RTOs and RPOs, national emergency preparedness, and service restoration priority.
